title: Mojo vs Vulcan7 for Real Estate Prospecting in 2026
description: Mojo and Vulcan7 both promise power dialing for agents. One focuses on data accuracy and all-in-one workflow; the other's pricing remains unclear.
intro: Mojo Selling Solutions and Vulcan7 compete for the same desk: agents who cold-call expired listings, FSBOs, and circle-prospecting targets. Vulcan7 markets itself as the data-accuracy leader—claiming 14% more unique phone numbers per listing than competitors and an integrated CRM-dialer-training stack. Mojo's vendor page was unreachable during research, leaving pricing and current feature details unverified. This comparison relies on publicly available Vulcan7 information; agents considering Mojo should contact the vendor directly for up-to-date plans and capabilities.
verdict: Vulcan7 wins for agents who value data accuracy and want an all-in-one prospecting platform with live training included. Mojo may still suit buyers who already own complementary tools, but without current pricing or feature documentation, recommending it requires a leap of faith.

contenders.name: Vulcan7
contenders.bestFor: Agents who prioritize contact-data accuracy and want dialer, CRM, skip tracing, and live training in one subscription
pros: 14% more unique phone numbers per listing than competitors (vendor claim)
Daily-updated expired, FSBO, FRBO, and pre-foreclosure leads
Built-in power dialer with spam protection, AI call summaries, and transcription
Integrated CRM with email drip campaigns and DNC scrubbing
Map-based neighborhood search with absentee owner and high-equity filters
Live twice-weekly prospecting training (Take 52 Listings) included in all plans
Tier 1 carrier routing and caller-ID remediation to reduce spam flags
cons: Pricing structure not disclosed on public site; must contact sales
No integration list visible—unclear if it syncs with Salesforce, HubSpot, or MLS platforms
15+ years in market suggests legacy codebase; UI modernization unclear
Single-vendor lock-in: dialer, CRM, and leads bundled; harder to mix-and-match tools

contenders.name: Mojo Selling Solutions
contenders.bestFor: Unknown—vendor page unreachable; historical users may recognize brand from pre-2020 prospecting tools
pros: Established brand name in real estate dialing (historical recognition)
cons: Vendor website unreachable during research; cannot verify current product, pricing, or feature set
No publicly available lead-accuracy claims or data-refresh cadence
Integration capabilities, CRM functionality, and training offerings unknown
